case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS TAJ INDIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $257.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT TAJ INDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TAJ INDIA
